title: savia ovalis
intro: Savia ovalis, also known as Oval-shaped Sida, is a plant species in the genus Sida. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The leaves and roots of Savia ovalis have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Savia ovalis can be prepared as a decoction or tea by infusing the dried leaves and roots in hot water, or as a powder by grinding the dried plant material into a fine powder for use in herbal supplements.
